comment: 网站有 WAF 验证码保护，搜索功能需要手动验证。建议使用分类浏览功能。
loginCheckJs: (function(a){var r=a.url(),o=a.body(),t=a.code();if(o&&(403===t||503===t||502===t||200===t&&(o.includes('Verify Yourself')||o.includes('GOEDGE_WAF_CAPTCHA')))){var c=source.get('cf_count')||'0';c=parseInt(c)+1;source.put('cf_count',c);if(c<=3){for(var i=0;i<2;i++){try{var h=java.webView(r,r,'setTimeout(function(){window.legado.getHTML(document.documentElement.outerHTML);},5000);');if(h&&!h.includes('Verify Yourself')&&200===java.connect(r).code()){source.put('cf_count','0');return a}}catch(e){}}}java.toast('需要 WAF 验证');java.startBrowserAwait(r,'验证');source.put('cf_count','0');return java.connect(r)}return a})(result)
